title: DONATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of blankets, men's, women's, and children's clothing, linens in new or nearly new condition (twin sheets, comforters, pillowcases), travel-sized body wash, soap, shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, and other personal hygiene items. Food items also accepted. No car seats, furniture, or appliances (large or small). 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 647-7466 (503) 906-7690 Donations Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to drop off items. Short-term street parking is usually available by the front door. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 6:45am-5pm and 5:45pm-6am TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: MAX red and blue lines, Skidmore Fountain stop. Near bus lines 12, 19, and 20 on the Burnside Bridge. Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Book/Magazine Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - BURNSIDE SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - GUEST CARE HOUSING/SHELTER - MEN'S CONNECT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER
